scope: Exported top-level symbols, exported struct fields, and exported methods from non-internal/non-main packages.

dispositions.documented:top-level: Top-level public symbols are mentioned in the package coverage docs and listed in the generated public API index.
dispositions.excluded:cli-implementation-export: Exported CLI command implementation symbols are listed for audit completeness but are not supported import APIs.
dispositions.grouped:builder-member-family: Builder, query, and fluent API members are reviewed as documented method families plus the generated member index.
dispositions.grouped:configuration-fields: Configuration struct fields are reviewed through the configuration reference plus the generated field index.
dispositions.grouped:dto-fields: Request/response DTO fields are reviewed through the module or built-in resource docs plus the generated field index.
dispositions.grouped:type-member-family: Type fields and methods are reviewed as package-specific member families plus the generated member index.
